title: AWS Student Builder Group FAST Peshawar identity
author: AWS Student Builder Group FAST Peshawar
summary: FAST Peshawar now publishes events and projects under the AWS Student Builder Group name.
body: FAST Peshawar now uses the AWS Student Builder Group name. The group began as AWS Cloud Club FAST Peshawar.
Students still run the sessions. The calendar centers on workshops, talks, project work, and beginner access to AWS and AI topics.
Use Meetup to register for events. Follow LinkedIn for announcements and recaps. Use GitHub for project work.

title: Learning tracks for cloud, AI, DevOps, security, and data
author: AWS Student Builder Group FAST Peshawar
summary: Students can start with free AWS links before they join a workshop or project sprint.
body: Start with cloud foundations, AI, DevOps, security, data, or certification prep.
Each track links to free AWS material and points to a workshop topic the group can run on campus or online.
Pick one topic, attend a session, then build a small demo you can explain.

title: Open project ideas for student builders
author: AWS Student Builder Group FAST Peshawar
summary: Students can pick from maintained project ideas instead of starting from a blank repo.
body: Good student projects solve one campus or learning problem, list a maintainer, include a README, and keep cloud costs visible.
The current list starts with this website, workshop lab templates, and certificate verification.
New ideas should include a demo goal, cleanup notes, and one first issue for beginners.
